hero.title: Find your bike.
hero.sub: We stock electric, city, mountain and kids bicycles. For repairs, we also have a trusted workshop.

cats.sub: Choose the right type for you.
featured.title: Featured bicycles
about.title: A family shop for bike lovers.
about.body: For over ten years, we have helped people in Tbilisi choose the right bicycle and keep it in good shape with careful repairs.
repair.title: Trusted bicycle repair.
repair.sub: Repair time depends on the work needed. Contact us in advance and we will agree on the timing.
rp.prev1d: Pad replacement, bleeding and adjustment for safe, sharp stops.
rp.prev2d: Smooth, precise shifting across the whole cassette.
rp.prev3d: Tubes, tires and puncture fixes after a quick check.
rp.prev4d: A complete safety check of frame, brakes, drivetrain and wheels.
contact.title: Visit the shop or message us.
catalog.title: All bicycles
search.ph: Search by name, type or keyword…
sort.label: Sort
product.interestedSub: Contact us for more information or visit the shop to see it in person.
foot.tag: A family bicycle shop & workshop in the heart of Tbilisi.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page explains how we handle information sent through this website, phone, WhatsApp or social media.
privacy.s1b: When you contact us, we may receive your name, phone number, message, bike type and repair details. The website may also receive basic technical data needed to load the site.
privacy.s2b: We use this information to reply to your request, confirm product availability, discuss repairs and provide shop service.
privacy.s3b: WhatsApp, phone calls, email and Facebook messages are handled by those third-party services. We do not sell personal data.
privacy.s4b: We keep messages only as long as needed for communication, service history or ordinary business records.
privacy.s5b: You can ask us about your data or request deletion by contacting us at {email} or {phone}.
legal.title: Legal Info
legal.intro: GigaBike is a physical bicycle shop and repair workshop. This website is informational and does not sell products online.
legal.note1: Products shown on the website are for information only.
legal.note2: Availability, final price and product condition are confirmed in the shop or by direct contact.
legal.note3: Repairs are assessed after inspection. Timing and cost are confirmed before work starts.
legal.note4: Photos are used to present the shop, products and cycling culture. Contact us if you have a question about a photo.
lang.note: Language updated. Some product descriptions may remain in the original language.
rp.title:
Trusted bicycle
repair.
rp.sub: Tell us what needs fixing. We will inspect the bike and confirm the repair time.
rp.servicesSub: From a quick brake tweak to a full drivetrain overhaul.
rp.priceNote: Prices are approximate. The final cost depends on parts and the amount of work needed.
rp.why1d: We inspect the bike first, then tell you when it can be ready.
rp.why2d: We repair city, mountain, kids and electric bicycles.
rp.why3d: We tell you the cost before starting and do not add unnecessary work.
rp.why4d: Message or call us, explain the issue, and we will tell you the next step.
rp.formSub: Send the details and we'll reply on WhatsApp with a quote and a time.
rp.fProblemPh: e.g. brakes are soft and the gears skip…
rp.fAlt: Prefer to talk? Call us directly:
rp.fError: Please add your name and phone number.
